title: ヤエノムテキの見取り稽古

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A young girl comes over to talk to Yaeno Muteki
as she does her pre-training routine.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hngh... Such an adorable youngster... I must keep
her safe from harm.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(But it's almost time for training... How am I to
address this dilemma?)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (I know! I can teach her self-defense techniques!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Would you like to join me for some martial arts
practice?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
A fine reply! In that case, try copying my
movements!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, you have potential. I may have stumbled
upon a master in the making here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While demonstrating techniques for the little girl,
Yaeno Muteki loses track of time and ends up
missing her own training entirely.
